| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|qid=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui|en|Oyamakui no Kami|ja|大山咋神|simple|Oyamakui no Kami|zh|大山咋神|qid=Q10935105|1=Oyamakui no Kami}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hiyoshi Shrine'''|日吉神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q125339990|ltq=Q125339990|qid=Q125339990|1=Sannō shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11638477|ltq=Q11638477|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}}
** Series ordinal: 114
** P155: {{ill|Ashitsumino Shrine|lt=Ashitsumino Shrine|qid=Q135039871|1=Ashitsumino Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135039873|ltq=Q135039873|qid=Q135039873|1=Taheno Shrine (Q135039873)}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Ōmi Province|lt=Ōmi Province|ca|Província d'Ōmi|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆمی|cs|Provincie Ómi|de|Provinz Ōmi|en|Ōmi Province|es|Provincia de Ōmi|fa|ولایت اومی|fi|Ōmin provinssi|fr|Province d'Ōmi|gl|Provincia de Ōmi|hak|Ōmi-koet|id|Provinsi Ōmi|it|Ōmi|ja|近江国|ko|오미국|lt|Omio žemė|nl|Omi (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Ōmi|pt|Província de Ōmi|ru|Оми (провинция)|simple|Ōmi Province|sk|Ómi (provincia)|sr|Провинција Оми|tr|Ōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Омі|vi|Tỉnh Ōmi|zh_min_nan|Ômi-kok|zh_yue|近江國|zh|近江國|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}

== dedicated to (P825) ==
